---
title: 'Homeless'
date: '2016-02-02T14:29:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '7607404345227710915'
blogger_filename: '/2016/02/homeless.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
God is good to me, even when my eyes cannot see.<br />
God is good to me, when I doubt and I fear.<br />
God is good to me,<br />
<br />
<br />
Three years today, he struck out on his own.<br />
Packed one bag, headed south, leaving the world behind.<br />
He had no plan, no direction, just the first train out of here.<br />
He's been roaming around ever since.<br />
<br />
Shoppings gets much easier, when you don't have a home.<br />
You only want what you can take with you.<br />
Food, a few clothes, and a book or two.<br />
Things aren't needs, if you can't take them with you.<br />
<br />
Hotels, motels, camping grounds,<br />
Shelters, alleys, and cardboard boxes,<br />
He'd tried everything as a shelter for a night.<br />
Now this life is getting old, and so is he.<br />
<br />
It's time to come home, but he has none.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
